patterns.decisionQuestion: Which operating segment, queue, or record needs action now, why, and where should the user go next?
patterns.emptyStateCopy: No priority work is active. Review recent activity or adjust the operating segment filter.

typography: Dashboard H1 uses Forge CRM text-2xl scale; KPI numbers may be text-3xl only inside stat cards.
Priority work, activity, card titles, and table titles use text-sm/text-xs; routine card headers do not use text-lg/text-xl.
density: At a desktop review viewport, first viewport shows control tower signal, compact KPI/stat strip, trend/risk visual, and at least one priority work or activity surface.
Do not spend the first viewport on four isolated KPI cards.
KPI/stat rows use one visual treatment. A colored high-emphasis anchor belongs on its own surface or grid position, not mixed into an otherwise white KPI row.
Risk-heavy dashboards should not use a large saturated red StatCard as the default anchor. Prefer a white SurfaceCard with small red Label/ProgressBar signals.
spacing: Use gap-4/gap-5 for dashboard grids; reserve gap-6/p-6 for one major chart panel at most.
borders: Use Forge cards with outline-fg-grey-200; avoid stacked custom card shells.
profileRegion: Use native AppLayout topbar profile and keep it visually secondary.
rightRail: Activity/context rail is compact, scannable, and paired with a main visual or priority-work surface.

forbiddenShortcuts: Do not stop at four KPI cards.
Do not render priority work as a generic recent items list without owner, status, risk, and route.
Do not omit trend/risk/readiness visual surfaces.
Do not mix one saturated StatCard with multiple white KPI cards in the same KPI row.
Do not render breach/risk focus as a wide saturated red StatCard unless the page is explicitly an incident alarm board.
Do not make dashboard KPI values smaller than routine H1 text.
Do not put create/edit/resolve flows directly on the dashboard.
Do not rely on quality-eval text reports without browser screenshot acceptance.
Do not use hero-sized page H1; keep admin dashboard titles near Forge CRM text-2xl scale.
